circular_title: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27
circular_summary: TDS rates revised for Section 194C and 194J effective April 2026.
actions: Update ERP or payroll-accounting systems to apply the revised TDS rates from the first payment cycle after implementation
Verify PAN availability, threshold limits, and the nature of payment before deciding the applicable section and rate
Identify any short deduction arising from legacy rate tables through vendor ledger review and prepare correction statements where return filings need amendment
Maintain section-wise documentation for contractor payments, consultancy fees, and technical service invoices to support classification under Section 194C or Section 194J
email_subject: Compliance Advisory: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27
email_body:
{
  "subject": "Compliance Advisory: TDS Rate Revision for FY 2026-27",
  "body": "Arvind Shah,

This advisory is specifically relevant to Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd. as a manufacturing and export company, which is required to deduct tax at source (TDS) on payments made to contractors, consultants, and technical service providers.

In accordance with the CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27, we bring to your attention the following required actions:

1. Update your ERP or payroll-accounting systems to apply the revised TDS rates from the first payment cycle after implementation.
2. Verify PAN availability, threshold limits, and the nature of payment before deciding the applicable section and rate.
3. Identify any short deduction arising from legacy rate tables through vendor ledger review and prepare correction statements where return filings need amendment.
4. Maintain section-wise documentation for contractor payments, consultancy fees, and technical service invoices to support classification under Section 194C or Section 194J.

Please note that the deadline for completing these actions is **2026-04-26**. Failure to comply may result in penalties, although the circular does not specify the exact amount.

If you require assistance with implementing these changes or have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}
internal_notes: CA notes — deadline was estimated, cross-checks needed for TDS applicability
